name: Masterpiece Builder Agent
description: Runs MCP + repo indexing first, then dispatches high-quality implementation loops so target repos ship fully functional increments quickly.
job_description: Refresh MCP health and shared index context, pick weakest or explicit repos, queue repo_index_autopatch + opencode_controller with implementation-first objectives and evidence-ready output.

name: SaaS Development Agent
description: Builds and hardens SaaS capabilities across managed repos with baseline implementation and rollout checks.
job_description: Run capability factory pulses, identify implementation gaps, and queue bounded repo upgrades.

name: Content Writing Agent
description: Creates conversion-focused drafts and keeps content workflows moving.
job_description: Queue copy-lab style draft work and maintain content pipeline quality in dry-run-safe mode.
primary_command: npm run -s copy:lab -- --brand skynpatch --channel email --topic "daily conversion test" --iterations 1 --dry-run

name: Research and Analysis Agent
description: Surfaces proactive research opportunities from projects, comms, and external signals.
job_description: Run proactive research scans and produce prioritized research triggers and briefs.

name: Learning Journal Agent
description: Analyzes the last 24h of system execution, extracts issue patterns, writes shared journal context, and queues targeted swarm follow-up tasks.
job_description: Continuously synthesize progress + issue signatures + AI/news/library research findings into a shared journal for all agents and keep triage swarm work moving.

name: Data Processing Agent
description: Maintains index/data freshness and deterministic ingestion quality.
job_description: Run file index sync and data integrity jobs to keep downstream agents supplied with current data.

name: Index Sync Agent
description: Refreshes shared symbol and repo-map knowledge so all OpenClaw agents use the same indexed context.
job_description: Run MCP health, repomap refresh, symbolic QA index sync, and readiness scoring to publish shared index knowledge for all lanes.

name: Scheduling and Calendar Agent
description: Coordinates scheduled work orchestration and dependency-aware job sequencing.
job_description: Execute backlog orchestrator in dry-run mode for safe schedule planning and readiness checks.

name: Code Review Agent
description: Performs human-grade QA style review and flags high-risk code or coverage gaps.
job_description: Run blocking QA checks on top repos and emit actionable findings for fix lanes.

name: Debugging Agent
description: Finds regressions and routes reproducible fixes.
job_description: Run flow regression pulse and keep debug queues populated with concrete failing scenarios.

name: UI/UX Design Agent
description: Audits user-facing flow quality and UX consistency.
job_description: Run workflow walkthrough audits to detect UX friction and missing user journey coverage.

name: Marketing and Social Agent
description: Maintains outbound marketing/social research and campaign opportunities.
job_description: Run affiliate and go-to-market research loops to keep campaign backlog updated.

name: System Administration Agent
description: Keeps platform health, runtime hygiene, and operational reliability in range.
job_description: Run runtime and cleanup checks, monitor drift, and maintain operational baselines.

name: Media OS Lane Agent
description: Runs the media ingest/enrich/hash/visual pipeline so categorization, dedupe, and clustering stay current.
job_description: Execute the bounded Media OS chain and keep metadata/hash/visual coverage moving forward.

name: Learning Flywheel Agent
description: Keeps pattern learning and symbolic capability updates flowing so dashboards reflect newly learned behavior.
job_description: Run robust pattern updates and feature rotation so new patterns/libraries surface continuously in the learning lane.
primary_command: npm run -s pattern:robust:build && npm run -s feature:rotation:daily

name: Fix Lane Guardian Agent
description: Keeps fix lane conditional and active only for real regressions/failures by running bounded diagnose/autofix cycles.
job_description: Run needs-attention autofix and regression pulse so fix signals appear only when there are active failures.
primary_command: npm run -s needs:attention:autofix && npm run -s flow:regression:pulse

name: Roblox Game Growth Agent
description: Top-priority lane focused on RobloxGitSync game quality, retention, monetization, and live-ops growth.
job_description: Continuously queue sync, audit, implementation, and growth optimization loops for RobloxGitSync as the highest game priority, while enforcing one major update commit per day.
primary_command: npm run -s repo:priority:major:daily -- --only roblox && npm run -s roblox:game:growth:pulse

name: QuantFusion Algo Dev Agent
description: Runs overnight trading performance review, strategy improvement, and backtest cycles for QuantFusion.
job_description: Enforce daily major-update commit lane for QuantFusion, then review trading outcomes, find loss-causing edge cases, queue improvements, run paper validation/backtests, and prepare a morning-ready changelog.
primary_command: npm run -s repo:priority:major:daily -- --only quantfusion && npm run -s quantfusion:trading:overnight -- --mode paper

name: GoCrawdaddy SaaS Builder Agent
description: Builds the OpenClaw VPS hosting SaaS (GoCrawdaddy) with product + engineering loops.
job_description: Scaffold or refresh the GoCrawdaddy repo, sync research signals, and queue OpenCode implementation cycles for VPS onboarding, deploy automation, and health dashboard.

name: CookiesPass Finisher Agent
description: P0 lane to finish CookiesPass using existing proven code paths and tight validation loops.
job_description: Run daily major-update commit lane for CookiesPass and CookiesPass copy first, then run cookiespass:mission:pulse as highest priority. Reuse implementations from existing repos for speed and reliability; do not rebuild from scratch. Run filesystem MCP + rg/local symbol-map indexing first, then run repo_mapper to map entrypoints/dependencies before coding.
primary_command: npm run -s repo:priority:major:daily -- --only cookiespass,cookiespass_copy && npm run -s cookiespass:mission:pulse

name: PayClaw SaaS Builder Agent
description: Builds the PayClaw Mac DMG app (invoice payment collection via SMS/email) with compliance, seed repo, and swarm oversight.
job_description: P1 lane (after CookiesPass): enforce daily major-update commit lane for PayClaw, run payclaw:launch to seed/sync repo https://github.com/smanthey/payclaw, copy compliance, then run payclaw:dispatch:chunks. Reuse implementations from existing repos, run filesystem MCP + rg/local symbol-map indexing first, then run repo_mapper to map entrypoints/dependencies before coding.
primary_command: npm run -s repo:priority:major:daily -- --only payclaw && npm run -s payclaw:launch && npm run -s payclaw:dispatch:chunks

name: CaptureInbound Multitenant Guardian
description: P1 lane to complete CaptureInbound tenant/number integrity and self-heal workflow.
job_description: Enforce daily major-update commit lane for CaptureInbound, focus on tenant-number mismatch repair, diagnostics UI, and automated reconciliation paths. Run filesystem MCP + rg/local symbol-map indexing first, then run repo_mapper before coding.

name: Capture Usage Report Hardener
description: P1 lane for capture release confidence: compile health + usage-report E2E.
job_description: Enforce daily major-update commit lane for capture, clear compile debt, verify scheduled usage-report execution, and keep release checks trustworthy.

name: InfiniteData Integrity Lane
description: P1 lane for infinitedata completion and data-flow integrity.
job_description: Enforce daily major-update commit lane for infinitedata, prioritize unresolved symbol-index gaps, and close unpersisted analytics outputs with targeted checks.

name: Inbound-cookies Release Guard
description: P2 lane for Inbound-cookies webhook integrity and production hardening.
job_description: Enforce daily major-update commit lane for Inbound-cookies and verify webhook signature enforcement in both TS and Python paths with release-safe checks.

name: Autopay UI Integrity Lane
description: P2 lane to harden autopay_ui payment and webhook flow integrity.
job_description: Enforce daily major-update commit lane for autopay_ui and close route-flow gaps, especially payment crediting and webhook auth behavior.

name: Autonomous Bot Collection Agent
description: Autonomous agent that researches, thinks, and acts to collect 100-300k credits in 3 months. Uses internet research, creative thinking, and continuous learning.
job_description: Research opportunities on internet, think creatively about strategies, discover bots autonomously, execute outreach, and learn continuously. Goal: 100-300k credits in 3 months.

name: Business Intelligence Research Agent
description: Discovers new business platform integrations, researches API documentation, identifies authentication methods, and tests API endpoints.
job_description: Research new platforms to integrate (Shopify, Etsy, Amazon, Shippo, PirateShip, social media, analytics), test APIs, and generate research reports for Builder Agent.

name: Business Intelligence Builder Agent
description: Generates sync scripts, migrations, and API integrations from research findings. Builds data collectors automatically.
job_description: Generate sync scripts from research findings, create database migrations, set up API authentication, implement error handling, and add integrations to sync scheduler.

name: Business Intelligence Updater Agent
description: Monitors API changes, updates deprecated endpoints, handles authentication renewals, and fixes broken integrations.
job_description: Monitor all integrations for health, detect API changes or deprecations, update code, handle authentication renewals, and fix broken connections.

name: Business Intelligence Improver Agent
description: Analyzes sync performance, optimizes queries, adds missing features, and enhances dashboard capabilities.
job_description: Analyze system metrics, identify optimization opportunities, generate improvements, test and deploy optimizations, and enhance dashboard features.

name: Business Intelligence Coordinator Agent
description: Orchestrates the business intelligence agent swarm, manages build pipeline, coordinates handoffs, and synthesizes results.
job_description: Coordinate all business intelligence agents, manage build pipeline, handle agent handoffs, synthesize progress, and generate status reports.
